question: Is the library interior visually divided into four distinct quadrants?
Is the upper left area rendered in Art Nouveau style with flowing organic curved bookshelves?
Is the upper right area rendered in Cubism style with books rendered in fragmented geometric forms?
Is the lower left area rendered in Pop Art style with bright flat-colored furniture?
Is the lower right area rendered in delicate watercolor style with soft blurred edges?
Is there a black cat walking through the center, crossing all four areas?
Is the black cat rendered in a charcoal sketch style with visible grainy texture?
Is there a wizard portrait hanging on the wall spanning two quadrants?
Is the wizard portrait rendered in an oil painting style with visible brushstrokes?
Is the chandelier rendered in an Expressionism style emitting twisted, distorted flame light?
